creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin ◐ from comment #12)

> I planned four tests

The disruptions caused by the first test were significant. 

I don't plan to reuse virtual_oss or virtual_oss_ctl. 

IIRC my past use of virtual_oss_ctl was solely for pushing beyond maximum levels, to make hearing loss more bearable (in the same way that I use an 'up-to-eleven' extension with Firefox). 

System restarts aside, audio on FreeBSD makes me feel uneasy. I don't plan to complete the other tests. Let's close this as overcome by events.
